parameters.jsCode: const tz="America/New_York";function fmt(d){const ld=new Date(d.toLocaleString("en-US",{timeZone:tz}));return ld.toISOString().slice(0,10);}const now=new Date();const today=fmt(now);const yday=fmt(new Date(now.getTime()-24*3600*1000));return [{today,yday}];

const all=$input.all().flatMap(it=>(it.json.dates||[]).flatMap(d=>d.games||[]));const now=Date.now(),pre=172800000,post=172800000;const active=all.filter(g=>{try{const t=new Date(g.gameDate).getTime();return (t-pre)<=now && now<=(t+post);}catch{return false;}});return active.map(g=>({json:{gamePk:g.gamePk}}));

const out=[];const input=$input.all();const source=$items('04 Filter Active Games1',0)||[];const seen={};for(let i=0;i<input.length;i++){const it=input[i];const plays=it.json?.liveData?.plays?.allPlays||[];const gamePk=source[i]?.json?.gamePk??it.json?.gamePk??it.json?.gameData?.game?.pk??null;if(!gamePk)continue;for(const p of plays){if(p?.result?.eventType!=='home_run')continue;const playId=p?.playId??null;const atBatIndex=p?.about?.atBatIndex??'x';const key=playId?`hr:${gamePk}:${playId}`:`hr:${gamePk}:ab:${atBatIndex}`;if(seen[key])continue;seen[key]=true;out.push({json:{gamePk,play:p}})}}return out;

const plays=$items("06 Extract New HR Plays1");const contents=$input.all();function asArr(x){return Array.isArray(x)?x:(x?[x]:[]);}function uniq(a){return Array.from(new Set(a));}function norm(s){return String(s||"").toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g," ").trim();}function lastName(s){const t=norm(s).split(" ").filter(Boolean);return t.length?t[t.length-1]:"";}function prefer4000K(u){return u.find(x=>/4000k/i.test(x))||u[0]||null;}function getGamePkFromContent(c){const link=c?.link||"";const m=link.match(/game\/(\d+)\/content/);if(m) return m[1];return String(c?.gamePk||c?.game_pk||"");}function collectItems(c){const items=[];const h=c?.highlights||{};items.push(...asArr(h?.highlights?.items));items.push(...asArr(h?.live?.items));const ed=c?.editorial||{};if(ed?.recap?.mlb) items.push(ed.recap.mlb);items.push(...asArr(ed?.recap?.items));items.push(...asArr(ed?.featured?.items));items.push(...asArr(ed?.highlights?.items));const m=c?.media||{};for(const g of asArr(m?.epg)) items.push(...asArr(g?.items));for(const g of asArr(m?.epgAlternate)) items.push(...asArr(g?.items));return items.filter(Boolean);}function getPlaybacks(it){const p=asArr(it?.playbacks).concat(asArr(it?.media?.playbacks));return uniq(p.map(pb=>pb?.url||"").filter(u=>typeof u==="string"&&/\.mp4(\?|$)/i.test(u)));}function getText(it){return norm(it?.headline||it?.title||it?.blurb||it?.description||it?.media?.title||"");}function getKeywordsAll(it){return asArr(it?.keywordsAll).concat(asArr(it?.media?.keywordsAll));}function extractPlayerIds(it){const ids=new Set();for(const k of getKeywordsAll(it)){const v=String(k?.value??"").toLowerCase();if(k?.playerId!=null) ids.add(String(k.playerId));if(k?.personId!=null) ids.add(String(k.personId));if(k?.player_id!=null) ids.add(String(k.player_id));if(k?.person_id!=null) ids.add(String(k.person_id));const m=v.match(/playerid-(\d+)/);if(m) ids.add(m[1]);if(/^\d+$/.test(v)) ids.add(v);}return ids;}function itemHasBatter(it,bId,bName){const ids=extractPlayerIds(it);if(ids.has(String(bId))) return true;const txt=getText(it);const ln=lastName(bName);const full=norm(bName);return (ln&&txt.includes(ln))||(full&&txt.includes(full));}const contentByGame={};for(const inp of contents){const cj=inp?.json??{};const gpk=getGamePkFromContent(cj);if(!gpk) continue;if(!contentByGame[gpk]) contentByGame[gpk]=[];contentByGame[gpk].push(...collectItems(cj));}function selectClips(gamePk,bId,bName){const items=contentByGame[String(gamePk)]||[];if(!items.length) return {d:null,a:null,pickedFrom:"",matchedBy:"noContent"};const hrItems=items.filter(it=>{const t=getText(it);return t.includes("home run")||t.includes("homers")||t.includes("homer")});let candidates=hrItems.filter(it=>itemHasBatter(it,bId,bName));let matchedBy="keywordsAll.playerId|name";if(!candidates.length){candidates=items.filter(it=>itemHasBatter(it,bId,bName));matchedBy="broad.nameOrId";}let d=null,a=null,pickedFrom="";for(const it of candidates){const urls=getPlaybacks(it);const diamond=urls.filter(u=>/mlb-cuts-diamond\.mlb\.com/i.test(u));const pd=prefer4000K(diamond);if(pd){d=pd;pickedFrom=it?.headline||it?.title||"";break;}}if(!d) return {d:null,a:null,pickedFrom:"",matchedBy:"noDiamond"};const darkroomItems=items.filter(it=>itemHasBatter(it,bId,bName)).map(it=>({it,urls:getPlaybacks(it)})).filter(x=>x.urls.some(u=>/darkroom-clips\.mlb\.com/i.test(u)));darkroomItems.sort((a,b)=>{const at=getText(a.it),bt=getText(b.it);const aHr=(at.includes("home run")||at.includes("homers")||at.includes("homer"))?1:0;const bHr=(bt.includes("home run")||bt.includes("homers")||bt.includes("homer"))?1:0;return bHr-aHr;});for(const x of darkroomItems){const pa=x.urls.find(u=>/darkroom-clips\.mlb\.com/i.test(u)&&/\.mp4(\?|$)/i.test(u));if(pa){a=pa;break;}}return {d,a,pickedFrom,matchedBy};}const out=[];for(const p of plays){const pj=p.json||{};const gamePk=pj.gamePk;const play=pj.play;if(!gamePk||!play) continue;const bId=play?.matchup?.batter?.id;const bName=play?.matchup?.batter?.fullName||"";const {d,a,pickedFrom,matchedBy}=selectClips(gamePk,bId,bName);if(!d) continue;out.push({json:{gamePk,play,d,a,debug:{matchedBy,pickedFrom,batter:bName,haveDarkroom:!!a}}});}return out;

const out=[];const src=$items("09 Build Post + Paths",0)||[];for(const it of src){const j=it.json||{};const isMp4=(typeof j.d==='string' && /\.mp4(\?|$)/i.test(j.d));if(isMp4) out.push({json:j});}return out;

const out=[];const src=$items("09 Build Post + Paths",0)||[];for(const it of src){const j=it.json||{};const isMp4=(typeof j.a==='string' && /\.mp4(\?|$)/i.test(j.a));if(isMp4) out.push({json:j});}return out;

const src=$items("09 Build Post + Paths",0)||[];const out=[];for(const it of src){const j=it.json||{};const buf=Buffer.from(String(j.postText||''),'utf8');const bin=await this.helpers.prepareBinaryData(buf,'post.txt');out.push({json:j,binary:{data:bin}})}return out;

const out=[];const checks=$input.all();const srcItems=$items('09 Build Post + Paths',0)||[];for(let i=0;i<checks.length;i++){const chk=checks[i]?.json||{};const status=String(chk.stdout??chk.data??'').trim();if(status.includes('NEW_STATUS=NEW')){const src=srcItems[i]?.json||{};out.push({json:src});}}return out;
